column1: You _____ skate on the road. It's dangerous.
You _____ skate in the yard. You can go to the park.
You _____ skate regularly. It's good for your health.
You _____ ask any questions. I'll try to answer.
You can't use his adaptor. He's _____ on his laptop.
You _____ use the laptop. You can do it orally.
